## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Krinal Mehta to discuss a potential Managing Director role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is rapidly growing, closing a Series A round and on track to hit $6M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [The company offers AI-powered content marketing services, with an average deal size of $150k/year](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [They're building AI workflows and a platform to scale content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [The Managing Director role would involve client management, strategy, and product input](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Compensation for the role is in the $200k-$300k range plus equity](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [fwd.digital started as workshops, evolved into content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Currently at 35 clients, 60 deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Raised Series A funding despite being profitable](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Projecting $22M revenue by 2027](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)

### Technology and Approach

  - [Built AI workflows represented as code for various processes (content creation, hiring)](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Focus on providing strategy, execution, and AI-powered content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Aiming to expand beyond just text content into repurposing, imagery, and potentially video](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### Team Structure

  - [Managing Director oversees 1-2 pods, each with 5-8 client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Pods consist of 1 managing editor and 3-4 account managers/specialists](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)

### Role of Managing Director

  - [Hybrid of client management, strategy, and product input](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Involves bringing in clients, overseeing strategy, coaching team members](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Provides feedback for product improvements and new offerings](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Some external-facing responsibilities (teaching, recruiting)](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Compensation and Equity

  - [Base salary in the $200k range](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [OTE (On-Target Earnings) potentially reaching $300k+ with bonuses and revenue sharing](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
  - [Equity offered, with intentionally capped valuation to keep exercise costs low for employees](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)

### Krinal's Background and Motivations

  - [Currently at Newfold Digital, overseeing SEO for brands like Bluehost and Hostgator](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Extensive agency and in-house experience in SEO and digital marketing](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Interested in AI applications in the industry and potential for faster career growth](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Krinal to consider the opportunity and how it aligns with his career goals](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting for Friday to continue discussions](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [Krinal to contact Alice (from fwd.digital team) to arrange the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/4zbQ5Dh6jXL8ya21Y_PWMALzJuKWrWZY?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
